title: AGNS: Cobblemon
description: A Good Night's Sleep modifications to the Cobblemon [Fabric] pack.
body:
Our changes to the [Cobblemon Official Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemon-fabric) for A Good Night's Sleep.

<details>
  <summary>Cobblemon</summary>
  
* Ascension Megamons (Cobblemon)
* Cobblemon - Fight or Flight
* Cobblemon Capture XP
* Cobblemon Counter
* Cobblemon Integrations
* Cobblemon Pokedex (Cobbledex)
* Cobblemon Spawn Notification
* Cobblemon UI Tweaks
* Cobblemon Unchained
* Cobblemounts
* Cobblepedia
* MissingMons
* MyticMons
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Technology</summary>
  
* Create
* Create: Cobblemon Industrialized
* Create: Copycats+
* Create: Crafts & Additions
* Create: Slice & Dice
* Create: Steam 'n' Rails
* Dark Utilities
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Storage</summary>
  
* Applied Energistics 2 (w/ Wireless Terminals)
* Carry On
* Extended Drawers
* Traveler's Backpacks
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Building</summary>
  
* Amendments
* Building Wands
* FTB Ultimine **(not included)**
* ItemSwapper
* Macaw's Mods
* Magnum Torch
* Supplementaries
</details>

<details>
  <summary>Exploration</summary>
  
* Artifacts
* Comforts
* Do a Barrel Roll
* Lootr
* Nature's Compass
* Oh The Biomes We've Gone
* Universal Graves
* Wraith Waystones
* YUNG's Better Structures
</details>

**Note –** This modpack is not affiliated with Cobblemon in any way - this is an unofficial pack.
